name: integration_real_examples_of_what_sweaty_startups_ha
method: Real examples of what sweaty startups have sold for (pulled from real deals)

phases.name: scrape
steps: reddit_json_api: scrape r/sweatystartup posts with keywords: sold, selling, exit, acquired, bought, offer, asking
filter: posts containing dollar amounts + business sale language

phases.name: extract
steps: llm_parse: extract structured fields (business_type, annual_revenue, sale_price, multiple, seller_context)
dedup_check: skip if deal already in LEDGER/sweaty_deals.csv

phases.name: distribute
steps: content_factory: generate 3 viral posts per deal ('real example: [business type] sold for [X]x revenue')
product_updater: append to digital product deal database CSV
engagement_bait_converter: route best deals to posting queue
